Analysis Cercospora IPM

Author

Anderson Cerutti

Data and packages

Packages

library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(emmeans)
library(ggplot2)
library(car)
library(performance)
library(patchwork)
library(sjPlot)
library(flextable)
library(multcomp)
library(multcompView)

conflicted::conflict_prefer("select", "dplyr")
conflicted::conflict_prefer("filter", "dplyr")

Data

IPM_desc

IPM_data <- readxl::read_xlsx("data/Cercospora_IPM_measure.xlsx","IPM")
IPM_desc <- readxl::read_xlsx("data/Cercospora_IPM_description.xlsx", "IPM")
IPM_data_disease <-  IPM_data
IPM_data_yield   <-  IPM_desc
  
n_lesion_plot <- IPM_data_disease %>%
  filter(lesion_n > 0) %>%
  group_by(year, trial_ID, plot) %>%
  summarise(
    CPB = mean(CPB, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_lesion = n(),
    .groups = "drop",
    inc  = (n_lesion * 100)/50)

IPM_yield_data <- IPM_data_yield %>% 
  mutate(
     yld = weight_12/(80/43560), 
     kg_ha = yld*1.2085) %>% 
  dplyr::select(year, trial_ID, trial, env, field, plot, blk, trt, 
                  gen, fung_time, total, head, yld, kg_ha, NBLS)

CERC_IPM_data <- right_join(IPM_yield_data, n_lesion_plot,
                  by = c("year","trial_ID","plot")) %>%
                  filter(!field %in% c("WIN")) %>%
                  filter(!gen %in% c("Titan" , "Mermentau" , "PURPLE")) %>%
                  filter(!fung_time == "Head/Flor") %>% 
  mutate(
    pressure = ifelse(inc > median(inc), "high", "low"))

median(CERC_IPM_data$inc)
[1] 68
mean(CERC_IPM_data$inc)
[1] 63.14501
CERC_IPM_data %>% 
  group_by(pressure) %>% 
  summarise(n=n())

Descriptive

ggplot(CERC_IPM_data, aes(x = gen, y = kg_ha, color = env)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90)) +
  facet_wrap(~fung_time)
ggplot(CERC_IPM_data, aes(x = gen, y = kg_ha, color = as.factor(year))) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90)) +
  facet_wrap(~fung_time)
ggplot(CERC_IPM_data, aes(x = fung_time, y = kg_ha)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90)) +
  facet_wrap(~pressure)
ggplot(CERC_IPM_data, aes(x = total, y = kg_ha)) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90)) +
  facet_wrap(~fung_time)
ggplot(CERC_IPM_data, aes(x = total, y = kg_ha)) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90)) +
  facet_wrap(~gen, ncol=4)
ggplot(CERC_IPM_data, aes(x = head, y = kg_ha)) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90)) +
  facet_wrap(~env)
ggplot(CERC_IPM_data, aes(x = head, y = kg_ha)) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90)) +
  facet_wrap(~gen, ncol=4)

Fitting

Prod

mix_yld  <- lmer(kg_ha ~ 1 + ( 1 | blk), data=CERC_IPM_data, REML=F)
mix_yld1 <- lmer(kg_ha ~ gen + ( 1 | year / blk), data=CERC_IPM_data, REML=F)
mix_yld2 <- lmer(kg_ha ~ gen * fung_time + ( 1 | year / blk), data=CERC_IPM_data, REML=F)
mix_yld3 <- lmer(kg_ha ~ gen * pressure + ( 1 | year / blk), data=CERC_IPM_data, REML=F)
mix_yld4 <- lmer(kg_ha ~ pressure * fung_time + ( 1 | year / blk), data=CERC_IPM_data, REML=F)
mix_yld5 <- lmer(kg_ha ~ gen * fung_time * pressure + ( 1 | year/ blk), data=CERC_IPM_data, REML=F)
mix_yld6 <- lmer(kg_ha ~ gen * fung_time * pressure + ( 1 | env / blk), data=CERC_IPM_data, REML=F)
mix_yld7 <- lmer(kg_ha ~ gen * fung_time * pressure + ( 1 | year / env), data=CERC_IPM_data, REML=F)

AIC(mix_yld, mix_yld1, mix_yld2, mix_yld3, mix_yld4, mix_yld5, mix_yld6, mix_yld7)
BIC(mix_yld, mix_yld1, mix_yld2, mix_yld3, mix_yld4, mix_yld5, mix_yld6, mix_yld7)
anova(mix_yld6, mix_yld7)
summary(mix_yld6)

Quality

Total

mix_yld  <- lmer(total ~ 1 + ( 1 | blk), data=CERC_IPM_data, REML=F)
mix_yld1 <- lmer(total ~ gen + ( 1 | year / blk), data=CERC_IPM_data, REML=F)
mix_yld2 <- lmer(total ~ gen * fung_time + ( 1 | year / blk), data=CERC_IPM_data, REML=F)
mix_yld3 <- lmer(total ~ gen * pressure + ( 1 | year / blk), data=CERC_IPM_data, REML=F)
mix_yld4 <- lmer(total ~ pressure * fung_time + ( 1 | year / blk), data=CERC_IPM_data, REML=F)
mix_yld5 <- lmer(total ~ gen * fung_time * pressure + ( 1 | year/ blk), data=CERC_IPM_data, REML=F)
mix_yld6 <- lmer(total ~ gen * fung_time * pressure + ( 1 | env / blk), data=CERC_IPM_data, REML=F)
mix_yld7 <- lmer(total ~ gen * fung_time * pressure + ( 1 | year / env), data=CERC_IPM_data, REML=F)

AIC(mix_yld, mix_yld1, mix_yld2, mix_yld3, mix_yld4, mix_yld5, mix_yld6, mix_yld7)
BIC(mix_yld, mix_yld1, mix_yld2, mix_yld3, mix_yld4, mix_yld5, mix_yld6, mix_yld7)
anova(mix_yld6, mix_yld7)
summary(mix_yld6)

Degrees-of-freedom method: kenward-roger 
Confidence level used: 0.95 
P value adjustment: tukey method for comparing a family of 44 estimates 
significance level used: alpha = 0.05 
NOTE: If two or more means share the same grouping symbol,
      then we cannot show them to be different.
      But we also did not show them to be the same.

Head

mix_yld  <- lmer(head ~ 1 + ( 1 | blk), data=CERC_IPM_data, REML=F)
mix_yld1 <- lmer(head ~ gen + ( 1 | year / blk), data=CERC_IPM_data, REML=F)
mix_yld2 <- lmer(head ~ gen * fung_time + ( 1 | year / blk), data=CERC_IPM_data, REML=F)
mix_yld3 <- lmer(head ~ gen * pressure + ( 1 | year / blk), data=CERC_IPM_data, REML=F)
mix_yld4 <- lmer(head ~ pressure * fung_time + ( 1 | year / blk), data=CERC_IPM_data, REML=F)
mix_yld5 <- lmer(head ~ gen * fung_time * pressure + ( 1 | year/ blk), data=CERC_IPM_data, REML=F)
mix_yld6 <- lmer(head ~ gen * fung_time * pressure + ( 1 | env / blk), data=CERC_IPM_data, REML=F)
mix_yld7 <- lmer(head ~ gen * fung_time * pressure + ( 1 | year / env), data=CERC_IPM_data, REML=F)

AIC(mix_yld, mix_yld1, mix_yld2, mix_yld3, mix_yld4, mix_yld5, mix_yld6, mix_yld7)
BIC(mix_yld, mix_yld1, mix_yld2, mix_yld3, mix_yld4, mix_yld5, mix_yld6, mix_yld7)
anova(mix_yld6, mix_yld7)
summary(mix_yld6)
